title: PolyAPI Assistant Conversation
description: An AI assistant conversation for AI-powered document assistance and discovery in PolyAPI.

id.description: The unique identifier of the conversation.

slug.description: The slug identifier for the conversation.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

messages.description: The list of messages in the conversation.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was last updated.
